attacking_style: Long-range breakaway specialist who escapes early (80-90km out) then makes decisive tactical moves inside final 12-15km. Capable of both sustained efforts and explosive sprint finishes from reduced groups.
team_tactics: Team softens pursuit through domestique presence (GAMPER, GAUTIER at Dauphiné) while Van Moer stays clear. Benefits from teammates infiltrating chase groups to control pace behind breakaways.
terrain_preference: Circuit finishes and rolling terrain where breakaways can survive. Strong on KOM points collection, suggesting comfort on repeated moderate climbs. Thrives when breakaway margins are manageable (6-7 minutes) requiring late tactical racing.
vulnerability: Misjudges effort timing on early bridges, fading from decisive selections after premature attacks (Dwars door Vlaanderen 90km effort). Bike-handling liability in peloton crashes. Struggles when selections become too selective for his power profile.
key_patterns: Wins exclusively from long-range breakaways, never from bunch sprints or late attacks. (3 wins observed)
Makes tactical pivots inside final 12-15km after extended breakaway efforts, showing strong endurance reserve management.
Demonstrates superior sprint power from breakaway groups, winning from poor positions and outkicking specialists.
Collects KOM points opportunistically while in breaks, suggesting aggressive comprehensive breakaway commitment.
Bridges aggressively but tends to overcommit early, fading when initial efforts exceed 80-90km from finish.
form_trajectory: negative: 2022 showed misjudged early effort at Dwars door Vlaanderen after successful 2021 breakaway wins, suggesting tactical regression or declining form
